_meta.source: web_teams.json + parallel web-research agents (June 2026, cited), RE-VERIFIED after SEA/BAL corrections.
_meta.off_dials: motion/vertical/passcatch/scramble in {-1,0,+1}: +1 = 2026 play-caller's scheme AMPLIFIES that usage (keep lever full), -1 = SUPPRESSES (demote), 0 = neutral.
_meta.def_dials: single_high/two_high in {-1,0,+1}: push a genuinely-new-DC team's 2025 shell toward the researched lean; man for reference (man-rate handled in coordinator_scheme_2026). All-zero = known-neutral (keep 2025).
_meta.rule: OFFENSE 'off' entry ONLY where the 2026 PLAY-CALLER actually changed (verified). TRUE-continuity callers (KC Reid, GB LaFleur, JAX Coen, BUF Brady, CHI Ben Johnson, DAL Schottenheimer, NO Kellen Moore) have NO off entry => no discount. DEFENSE 'def' entry only for genuinely-new 2026 DCs.

ARI.note: Shanahan OZ + motion/PA; Murray gone -> pocket QBs

ATL.note: under-center wide-zone PA, bottom-third motion, possession passing, strict pocket

BAL.note: Payton/Johnson tree: motion + explosive PA + Lamar bootlegs
BAL.def_note: Minter's 2025 LAC scheme: ~81% zone (man -1), 49.6% two-high (4th-most, +1), single-high mix (0), low blitz, front-four pressure

BUF.def_note: 3-4 sim-pressure/creeper, Cover-1/Cover-3 single-high. OFFENSE = continuity (Brady was 2025 play-caller) -> no off entry

CAR.note: Canales wide-zone committing to MORE motion; short aDOT, RB screens

CLE.note: Air Coryell vertical PA, ~68% motion, RBs featured

DAL.def_note: Fangio-tree two-high, big cushion, low blitz. OFFENSE = continuity (Schottenheimer yr2) -> no off entry

DEN.playcaller: Davis Webb (OC, new caller; Payton handed it off)
DEN.note: Air Raid/spread roots + Waddle -> vertical; deep RB room

DET.note: motion + RPO/PA but Cardinals scheme was run-heavy/short/checkdown; Goff pocket

GB.def_note: NFL-heaviest Cover-4/quarters, low man, front-four zone. OFFENSE = continuity (LaFleur) -> no off entry

LAC.note: Miami ~70% motion, PA + screens + zone run, downfield off PA

LV.note: wide-zone, heavy motion + 12-personnel, deep PA bootlegs, RBs as receivers
LV.def_note: 3-4 multiple/disguise, no clear shell lean -> keep 2025

MIA.note: Shanahan motion/PA/screens, spacing/horizontal (not a vertical bomber)

NYG.playcaller: Matt Nagy (OC, calls plays in NY)
NYG.note: Reid-tree West Coast/spread, misdirection, RPO, motion

NYJ.note: veteran scheme, RB/TE motion to ID coverage, quick game (Geno), pocket QB

PHI.note: McVay/LaFleur-tree motion wide-zone (NOT run-heavy quick game); Hurts designed runs

PIT.note: West Coast timing, Rodgers quick game + checkdowns

SEA.playcaller: Brian Fleury (OC, NEW; Kubiak left for LV HC)
SEA.note: ~80% same wide-zone/under-center/PA family but new voice + MORE pre-snap motion/tempo (Fleury from SF); Darnold pocket QB. DC Durde NOT new.

TB.note: McVay-tree motion/PA/wide-zone for Mayfield; Bowles DC not new

TEN.note: Erhardt-Perkins motion + condensed splits + deep PA, WR/RB featured
TEN.def_note: 4-3 under, Cover-3 single-high zone, rush-4, low blitz

WAS.note: more under-center/balanced, less shotgun for Daniels
WAS.def_note: Flores/Vikings -> more two-high, heavy zone/match, very low man, disguised blitz
